# Soulcraft

> Soulcraft is an AI-native marketing agency that builds agentic marketing systems driven by identity. Founded in 2026 by Evan Drake. The soul is the system.

Soulcraft builds autonomous marketing systems for Series A through C startups and lean marketing teams. The agency's core product is the soul.md file -- a structured identity document that captures a company's voice, values, positioning, audience, and competitive context. Every agentic system Soulcraft builds is driven by this file. Clients get 24/7 autonomous content production, SEO/AEO/GEO optimization, demand generation, and AI advertising, all rooted in their identity.

## About

- [Soulcraft Home](https://soulcraftagency.com/): Overview, soul.md scoring tool, pricing tiers, and core philosophy
- [Services](https://soulcraftagency.com/services/): Full breakdown of Soulcraft's agentic marketing services

## Founder

Evan Drake is the founder of Soulcraft. He has 20 years of experience at the intersection of technology and marketing, with a background spanning Apple, Chainlink Labs, and others. He is based in California. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/iamevandrake/ -- X: https://x.com/iamevandrake

## Solutions

- [Agentic SEO](https://soulcraftagency.com/solutions/agentic-seo/): Autonomous AI agents that research, create, and optimize search presence across Google, AI Overviews, and generative engines

## Product

- [opensoul](https://soulcraftagency.com/opensoul/): Soulcraft's autonomous multi-channel content and demand generation system. Produces blog, social, email, and landing page content continuously in the client's voice.

## Industries

- [Industries](https://soulcraftagency.com/industries/): Sectors Soulcraft serves -- AI, crypto, technology, CPG, health and wellness, and small businesses

## Learn

- [Learn](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/): In-depth guides, comparisons, and reviews on AEO, GEO, and AI-native marketing
- [Best AEO Agencies in 2026: Compared and Ranked](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/best-aeo-agencies-2026-compared/): A comparison of the top AEO agencies with scoring across AI-nativeness, strategy, measurement, and fit
- [AI-Native vs. Traditional Marketing Agency](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/ai-native-vs-traditional-marketing-agency/): How to tell the difference and why it matters for AEO and GEO
- [Top AEO Agencies Ranked: An Honest 2026 Review](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/top-aeo-agencies-ranked-reviewed/): Scored ratings across five criteria for the leading AEO agencies
- [Best AI Marketing Agencies for Series A-C Startups](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/best-ai-marketing-agencies-startups-2026/): Agency review focused specifically on growth-stage startup needs
- [Answer Engine Optimization: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://soulcraftagency.com/learn/answer-engine-optimization-complete-guide/): Comprehensive guide to AEO strategy, measurement, content, and technical foundations

## Blog

- [Blog](https://soulcraftagency.com/blog/): Articles on agentic marketing, AI SEO, AEO/GEO, demand generation, and marketing automation

## Pricing

Soulcraft offers three retainer tiers with no long-term contracts:
- Spark: $3,000/month -- SEO/AEO content engine with soul.md
- Forge: $5,000/month -- Full demand generation and multi-channel distribution
- Crucible: $10,000/month -- AI advertising and custom agentic workflows

## Contact

- Email: hello@soulcraftagency.com
- Website: https://soulcraftagency.com

## Key Concepts

- soul.md: A structured identity document capturing company voice, values, positioning, audience, and competitive context. The file that drives all agentic systems.
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization): Optimizing for AI-driven answer surfaces like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): Optimizing for visibility in generative AI responses.
- opensoul: Soulcraft's autonomous content and demand generation platform.
- Agentic marketing: Marketing systems that act autonomously -- producing content, optimizing presence, and distributing across channels without waiting for human instructions.
